Triggers: 3 sec

Curse of Quietness
The unit casts silence on 4 random enemy units for 5 sec. These units are unable to use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) for 5 sec. The unit also steals 25% of all their stats for 5 sec. After the duration of silence ends, the ability's targets cannot receive any positive effects for 4 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
